description_long: This is a rectangular loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface features a prominent central crack, suggesting it was baked in a loaf pan and has expanded during baking. The crust appears firm and slightly rough, with subtle variations in color from light tan to deeper brown, indicating a well-baked exterior. The loaf's sides are straight and defined, with the bottom edges showing a slightly darker bake. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring beyond the natural crack on top. The bread appears whole and unsliced, with no visible branding or packaging.
description: A golden-brown rectangular loaf of bread with a cracked, domed top and a firm, slightly rough crust. The loaf is whole and unsliced, showing natural baking marks.
description_view_0: This view highlights the domed top with a central crack and shows the loaf's slightly rounded edges and golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the straight sides and the even coloration of the crust, with the top crack still visible.
description_view_2: The loaf appears more elongated from this perspective, with the top crack running along its length and the crust's texture clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the loaf, with a smooth, uninterrupted crust and the top crack less pronounced.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a natural, uneven crack running along the top, with a slightly rough and rustic texture. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring, giving it a homemade appearance.
